Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ".specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1" -Json "Ralph Wiggum Loop \(Gold Tier\) — Implement the Ralph Wiggum stop-hook pattern that keeps Claude Code iterating until a multi-step task is complete. When Claude tries to exit, a stop hook checks if the task is actually complete. If not, it re-injects the prompt and lets Claude see its previous output to continue working. Two completion strategies: promise-based \(Claude outputs TASK_COMPLETE\) and file-movement \(task file detected in /Done\). Architecture: backend/ralph_wiggum/ with ralph_loop.py, stop_hook.py, state_manager.py, prompt_injector.py. Skills: skills/ralph-wiggum/SKILL.md. CLI: --completion-promise, --completion-file, --max-iterations, --status. State files in vault with YAML frontmatter tracking iteration count, completion strategy, timestamps. Safety: max iterations \(default 10\), iteration timeout \(default 5 min\), total timeout \(default 60 min\), emergency stop via vault/STOP_RALPH file. Env vars: RALPH_MAX_ITERATIONS, RALPH_ITERATION_TIMEOUT, RALPH_TOTAL_TIMEOUT. Orchestrator can spawn Ralph loops for complex tasks. All iterations logged to vault/Logs/. Respects DEV_MODE and DRY_RUN. SKILL.md first, then implement, then tests." -Number 1 -ShortName "ralph-loop")
